programme.title: The Genius Paik S2, Ep 1
programme.desc: Pemilik restoran papan atas Korea, Baek Jong-won, bersama sejumlah selebritas papan atas kembali menerima tantangan untuk membuka sebuah restoran sekaligus memperkenalkan masakan Korea ke dunia di sebuah negara asing.

programme.title: Happiness, Ep 9
programme.desc: Suatu virus baru nan mematikan di kota menyebabkan sebuah apartemen dengan penghuni dari berbagai kelas sosial ditutup. Mereka pun harus berjuang demi bertahan hidup meski dibayangi oleh ketakutan akan virus tersebut.

programme.title: 2022 MAMA Awards, Pt 1
programme.desc: Penghargaan musik K-pop No.1 dunia, MAMA Awards 2022, tahun ini kembali dengan tema K-Pop World Citizenship. Penghargaan ini merupakan kesempatan yang luar biasa untuk memahami nilai-nilai musik K-Pop.

programme.title: Guimoon: The Lightless Door
programme.desc: Saat Do-jin sang pengusir hantu pergi ke gedung komunitas yang ditinggalkan karena rumor kematian nan aneh, ia bertemu dengan tiga mahasiswa yang ingin membuktikan kabar tersebut dan menyadari bahwa mereka terjebak.

programme.title: The Day I Died: Unclosed Case
programme.desc: Seorang gadis menghilang di sebuah tebing dan tubuhnya tidak ditemukan. Seorang detektif melakukan penyelidikan terkait hilangnya gadis tersebut secara misterius.

programme.title: Ditto
programme.desc: Sebuah suara gema dari masa depan yang terpancar melalui sebuah radio antik menghubungkan dua orang yang hidup dalam periode waktu yang berbeda, dan mengubah hidup Yong selamanya.

programme.title: The Dude In Me
programme.desc: Seorang siswa SMA terpeleset dari atap sebuah bangunan dan jatuh menimpa seorang mafia. Kemudian di rumah sakit, keduanya bangun dengan tubuh tertukar.

programme.title: The Foul King
programme.desc: Seorang pegawai bank menemukan bakatnya sebagai pegulat dengan cara tak biasa. Namun, ia frustrasi karena hanya menang dengan menggunakan trik. Ia pun memutuskan untuk menguasai gerakan demi menjadi pegulat sejati.

programme.title: Kim Ji-Young: Born 1982
programme.desc: Kim Ji-young, seorang wanita Korea berusia 30-an, tiba-tiba menunjukkan tanda-tanda dirasuki oleh sosok almarhum ibu dan kakak perempuannya setelah ia menjadi ibu rumah tangga.

programme.title: Oh! My Gran
programme.desc: Saat putrinya koma setelah mengalami tabrak lari, sang ayah mencoba melacak si pengemudi dengan bantuan ibunya yang menderita penyakit Alzheimer dan satu-satunya saksi mata dalam kecelakaan tersebut.

programme.title: Tazza: The Hidden Card
programme.desc: Keponakan Go-ni, Ham Dae-gil, memasuki dunia perjudian hanya untuk dijadikan kambing hitam dalam transaksi yang tak berjalan mulus. Kini, ia merencanakan balas dendamnya dengan mengikuti satu pertandingan besar.

programme.title: The President's Barber
programme.desc: Seorang pria dan keluarganya terjerat dalam kekacauan politik selama beberapa dekade saat ia ditunjuk sebagai tukang cukur pribadi presiden.

programme.title: Beasts Clawing At Straws
programme.desc: Didorong oleh rasa putus asa, delapan orang yang bernasib kurang beruntung bertemu dan keadaan menjadi kacau balau saat mereka mengejar tas berisi uang yang misterius.

programme.title: Decibel
programme.desc: Seorang mantan komandan angkatan laut menerima panggilan ancaman yang mengaku akan meledakkan stadion dengan bom. Ia harus berhadapan dengan rahasia yang telah lama ia sembunyikan untuk melacak teroris ini.

programme.title: The Childe
programme.desc: Seorang petinju berdarah Korea-Filipina pergi ke Korea untuk mencari ayahnya demi operasi ibunya, tetapi keadaan menjadi kacau setelah ia bertemu dengan seorang pria misterius yang dikenal sebagai 'Bangsawan'.

programme.title: The Goblin
programme.desc: Usai mendekam selama sepuluh tahun di penjara, Doohyun dibebaskan dan ingin menjalani kehidupan biasa. Namun, rekan lamanya menculik sang putri hingga Goblin yang telah lama tersembunyi di dalam dirinya pun terbangun.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembunuh bayaran menyelidiki sebuah kasus penculikan yang mungkin melibatkan kerabat terdekatnya selagi ia terus dikejar oleh saudara kandung yang menjadi target terakhirnya.

programme.title: Search Out
programme.desc: Saat seorang bintang media sosial menemukan jejak penindasan di dunia maya yang menyebabkan tetangganya bunuh diri, ia bekerja sama dengan seorang peretas untuk mengungkap misteri kematian tetangganya.

programme.title: Go Go 70s
programme.desc: Film biografi musik yang diangkat dari kisah nyata tentang The Devils, sebuah band rock Korea yang dibentuk di tahun 1970-an ketika Korea sedang dipimpin oleh rezim militer yang kejam.

programme.title: Diva
programme.desc: Seorang diva menyelam menghadapi ketakutan tak terkira setelah mengalami sebuah kecelakaan mobil yang mengerikan dengan sahabatnya.

programme.title: Soar Into The Sun
programme.desc: Seorang pilot pesawat tempur elit melakukan sebuah misi penyelamatan terhadap rekan satu timnya yang hilang sekaligus menghadapi ancaman dari pasukan Korea Utara.

programme.title: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: Seorang pembantu dituduh melakukan pembunuhan. Sang pengacara terkejut saat mengetahui jika satu-satunya saksi adalah seorang gadis remaja penderita Asperger. Apakah gadis itu dapat memberikan pernyataan yang valid?

programme.title: Architecture 101
programme.desc: Seorang arsitek mendapat kunjungan tak terduga dari cinta pertamanya yang sudah bertahun-tahun tidak ia temui. Pertemuan itu pun membawa kembali kenangan saat mereka pertama kali bertemu 15 tahun yang lalu.

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Seorang politisi bertemu dengan ahli strategi kampanye berbakat yang membantunya menjadi calon kandidat presiden terkuat. Namun, konflik semakin dalam kala ia tidak setuju dengan ideologi terbaru sang politisi.

programme.title: A Little Princess
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang wanita berubah menjadi lebih baik kala ia bertemu dengan sang cucu untuk pertama kalinya.

programme.title: Boomerang Family
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga nan damai terganggu oleh kembalinya tiga anak yang telah dewasa satu demi satu. Setelah meninggalkan rumah bertahun-tahun lalu, kini mereka mencoba hidup berdampingan satu sama lain.

programme.title: Miracle: Letters To President
programme.desc: Seorang ahli matematika yang memiliki mimpi untuk membangun stasiun kereta api kecil di desanya berusaha keras untuk memenangkan kompetisi matematika dan mengajukan petisinya pada Presiden secara langsung.

programme.title: Pipeline
programme.desc: Sekelompok tim ahli dikumpulkan untuk mengebor pipa minyak di Korea dan mengambil minyak bumi, tapi rencana tersebut berubah saat kelompok itu mulai menipu satu sama lain.

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Pada suatu malam saat terjadi badai, Aman mendapatkan kekuatan dari pohon suci kala ia berkelahi dengan Raka. Ia pun tumbuh menjadi sesosok pahlawan super bernama Flying Jat untuk membantu orang-orang yang membutuhkan.

programme.title: Raksha Bandhan
programme.desc: Kisah seorang penjual chaat sekaligus kakak laki-laki tertua dari empat adik perempuan yang tanpa lelah berjuang untuk menepati janjinya kepada sang ibu yang sakit sembari menjunjung tinggi nilai-nilai keluarga mereka.

programme.title: Veere Di Wedding
programme.desc: Avni, Sakshi dan Meera datang menemui Kalindi setelah mendengar kabar tentang pernikahannya dengan sang kekasih, Rishabh. Sakshi pun mengajak mereka pergi ke Thailand untuk menemukan kembali jati diri masing-masing.

programme.title: Gangaa S2
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang janda muda bernama Gangaa, yang kehilangan suami dan ayahnya pada hari pernikahannya. Ayah Gangaa dan suaminya terbunuh dalam kerusuhan di tepi sungai Ganges di Varanasi.

programme.title: Kundali Bhagya
programme.desc: Mendiang ayah Preeta dan Shristhi mengungkap fakta bahwa ibu mereka masih hidup dan tinggal di Mumbai, yang ternyata adalah Sarla Arora dan keduanya merupakan saudari perempuan Pragya yang telah lama hilang.

programme.title: Ishq Subhan Allah S2
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Kabir dan Zara, dua penganut Islam dengan prinsip dan keyakinan yang sangat bertentangan, yang kehidupannya berubah secara drastis ketika mereka bertemu.

programme.title: Khana Khazana, Ep 76
programme.desc: Sebuah acara memasak yang dipandu oleh koki Sanjeev Kapoor dan berfokus pada masakan India.

programme.title: Waqt: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Ishwar berharap supaya anaknya, Aditya, berubah menjadi pria yang lebih bertanggung jawab setelah menikah. Namun harapan pengusaha sukses ini sia-sia dan Aditya pun diusir dari rumah setelah kembali membuat kesalahan.

programme.title: Gangaa S2, Ep 64
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang janda muda bernama Gangaa, yang kehilangan suami dan ayahnya pada hari pernikahannya. Ayah Gangaa dan suaminya terbunuh dalam kerusuhan di tepi sungai Ganges di Varanasi.

programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Kabir dan Zara, dua penganut Islam dengan prinsip dan keyakinan yang sangat bertentangan, yang kehidupannya berubah secara drastis ketika mereka bertemu.

programme.title: 1920 London
programme.desc: Setelah suaminya dirasuki oleh roh jahat, seorang wanita meminta bantuan mantan kekasihnya untuk melakukan pengusiran setan.

programme.title: Bol Radha Bol
programme.desc: Kishan Malhotra mendapati rumahnya ditempati seorang penipu yang menyamar menjadi dirinya. Saat berusaha mengungkapkan identitasnya, tak seorang pun mempercayai Kishan, termasuk ibunya sendiri.

programme.title: Baaghi: Rebels In Love
programme.desc: Tak lama setelah tiba di sebuah akademi bela diri, seorang pemuda bermasalah jatuh cinta pada gadis yang dirayu oleh saingannya.

programme.desc: Sebuah acara memasak yang dipandu oleh koki Sanjeev Kapoor dan berfokus pada masakan India.

programme.title: Goodbye
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga menjadi hancur berantakan usai sang ibu meninggal secara tiba-tiba. Anak-anaknya pun segera pulang untuk menyelesaikan upacara terakhir, tetapi sejumlah perbedaan pendapat membuat mereka berselisih.

programme.title: Gangaa S2, Ep 65
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang janda muda bernama Gangaa, yang kehilangan suami dan ayahnya pada hari pernikahannya. Ayah Gangaa dan suaminya terbunuh dalam kerusuhan di tepi sungai Ganges di Varanasi.

programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Kabir dan Zara, dua penganut Islam dengan prinsip dan keyakinan yang sangat bertentangan, yang kehidupannya berubah secara drastis ketika mereka bertemu.

programme.title: Happy New Year
programme.desc: Terinspirasi dari film Hollywood berjudul Ocean's Eleven, film ini menceritakan tentang perjalanan sekelompok pecundang yang dipimpin oleh Charlie untuk melakukan pencurian berlian terbesar di India.

programme.title: Dil Chahta Hai
programme.desc: Tiga pemuda bernama Akash, Sameer, dan Siddharth merupakan sahabat karib. Namun, mereka terpaksa berpisah karena perselisihan yang memuncak ketika Siddharth jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita yang lebih tua bernama Tara.

programme.title: Raazi
programme.desc: Sehmat Khan, seorang agen RAW yang menyamar, dinikahkan dengan pria Pakistan oleh sang ayah untuk mendapatkan beberapa informasi berharga tentang musuh.

programme.title: Bincang Sehati
programme.desc: Pembawa acara berbincang bersama para ahli tentang berbagai permasalahan dalam hidupan sehari-hari, serta bagaimana cara menghadapinya.

programme.title: Bincang Sehati
programme.desc: Pembawa acara berbincang bersama para ahli tentang berbagai permasalahan dalam hidupan sehari-hari, serta bagaimana cara menghadapinya.

programme.title: Madun
programme.desc: Meski dilarang oleh orangtuanya, Madun, seorang anak laki-laki, berusaha memperjuangkan cita-citanya untuk menjadi seorang pesepak bola.

programme.title: Dino Dana
programme.desc: Dana, seorang gadis yang pintar, bertualang di dunia dinosaurus untuk mempelajari bagaimana keseharian mereka. Hingga pada suatu hari, ia membayangkan bagaimana jika hewan-hewan purba tersebut hidup di zaman sekarang.

programme.title: Arpo
programme.desc: Ketika si robot super bernama Arpo dikeluarkan dari militer, ia pun mendapat sebuah misi penting, yaitu kembali pada keluarga DiLovely sebagai pengasuh Daniel, si bayi yang sering kali mendatangkan masalah, dan kakaknya yang usil, Joey.

programme.title: Cocomelon
programme.desc: Kisah-kisah petualangan seru JJ dan teman-temannya, yang bernyanyi dan menari sambil belajar tentang berbagai huruf, angka, dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum adalah acara yang menyenangkan dan mendidik untuk anak-anak yang menampilkan lagu anak-anak klasik dan baru.

programme.title: Cocomelon
programme.desc: Kisah-kisah petualangan seru JJ dan teman-temannya, yang bernyanyi dan menari sambil belajar tentang berbagai huruf, angka, dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Babybus
programme.desc: Kiki dan Miumiu, dua ekor panda yang menggemaskan, mengajak sahabat mereka, Timi, berkeliling dunia menjalani serangkaian petualangan seru untuk mempelajari berbagai hal menarik bersama-sama.

programme.title: Cipung Abubu
programme.desc: Kisah-kisah petualangan seru Cipung, si bayi ajaib yang lucu, anak kedua dari mama Gigi dan papa Raffi, yang selalu bermain dan belajar banyak hal bersama kakaknya yang usil tapi baik hati, si Aa, dan teman-temannya, Zayn dan Zuney.

programme.title: Shimajiro 2D
programme.desc: Kisah-kisah petualangan seru Shimajiro, si bocah harimau, bersama keluarga dan teman-teman binatangnya. Mereka selalu bermain, menjelajahi alam, sambil mempelajari kata-kata baru.

programme.title: Pororo The Little Penguin
programme.desc: Kisah-kisah petualangan Pororo, si pinguin kecil yang penuh dengan rasa keingintahuan, bersama teman-temannya yang tinggal di desa bersalju Porong Porong Forest. Mereka sering menghadapi berbagai tantangan, dan suka mempelajari berbagai hal baru.

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus
programme.desc: Menyajikan sederet cerita petualangan seru yang sehari-harinya dijalani oleh Tayo, sebuah bus unik dengan nomor 120, bersama para penumpang dan teman-teman dekatnya.

programme.title: Keluarga Somat
programme.desc: Serial Animasi Keluarga yang membahas kehidupan masyarakat sehari-hari melalui tokoh utama, Pak Somat, Bu Inah, Dudung, Ninung dan warga lainnya yang ber-Bhinneka Tunggal Ika.

programme.title: Pororo & Fairy Tales
programme.desc: Pororo adalah seekor pinguin yang pintar. Ia bersama teman-temannya sering menjalani serangkaian petualangan seru penuh tantangan di desa Porong Porong Forest.

programme.title: Pororo the Wizard
programme.desc: Pororo, Crong, Loopy, dan Eddy, para murid sekolah sihir, harus bekerja sama demi menyelamatkan guru Tongtong, yang telah diculik oleh sesosok penjahat yang mengincar sebuah tongkat sihir sakti.

programme.title: Titipo Titipo
programme.desc: Kereta api kecil yang baru lahir dari Train Center TITIPO baru saja lulus ujian mengemudi dan siap untuk bekerja di Desa Kereta. Meskipun TITIPO bercita-cita menjadi kereta terbaik di dunia.

programme.title: Babybus
programme.desc: Kiki dan Miumiu, dua ekor panda yang menggemaskan, mengajak sahabat mereka, Timi, berkeliling dunia menjalani serangkaian petualangan seru untuk mempelajari berbagai hal menarik bersama-sama.

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: Oddbods adalah seri berbasis sketsa yang mengikuti petualangan tujuh karakter menggemaskan saat mereka tertawa, membodohi, dan melakukan perjalanan melalui situasi yang tampaknya paling biasa, seringkali dengan konsekuensi yang tidak terduga.

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus
programme.desc: Menyajikan sederet cerita petualangan seru yang sehari-harinya dijalani oleh Tayo, sebuah bus unik dengan nomor 120, bersama para penumpang dan teman-teman dekatnya.

programme.desc: Tayangan sederet judul film-film terbaik Indonesia dan mancanegara dengan berbagai kisah menarik. Diperankan oleh aktor dan aktris terkemuka.

programme.title: Titipo Titipo

programme.title: Babybus

programme.title: Oddbods

programme.title: Pororo The Little Penguin

programme.title: Ollie And Friends
programme.desc: When Ollie and Cherry leave town to help a distant relative, the Shifty Squares volunteer to fill in for them on the Ollie Squad. But protecting Ollipolis is hard work, and the Imp's not convinced the Squares are up for the challenge.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of Pinkfong's most loved songs and stories with all your favourite characters!

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Celebrity guests such as Misty Copeland, Terri, Bindi and Robert Irwin, Chrissy Teigen and Josh Gad appear in the latest season of Sesame Street.

programme.title: Lupin's Tales
programme.desc: Lupin dreams of being like the storybook heroes he admires, and goes from one tale to the next to live out their adventures. But the impetuous wolf-cub is far from perfect, and it's not easy getting to that "happy ending"! Luckily, he can count on the Narrator's help to learn from his mistakes.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: Mr Guard gets Paula and her friends to help put together a surprise birthday party for Aamil. But Billy has trouble keeping the surprise a secret. Will he ruin it? Paula goes on an adventure by herself to help her friends in the jungle. However, she faces obstacles that are really hard to solve alone. Will she succeed or can she count on her friends when she needs them the most?

programme.title: Turbozaurs
programme.desc: The Turbozaurs are a dynamic team of friendly dinosaurs which can transform themselves instantly into amazing machines. They are discovered in the woods by three children, and together form a special rescue team!

programme.sub-title: Popcorn Panic / Gone In a Flash

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers have to stop a poacher in Africa. The Rangers have to save a colony of bats suffering from White Nose Disease.

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch
programme.desc: The Jungle Bunch tells the story of a group of loopy animals fighting injustice in the heart of the jungle, where every being who faces a problem knows who to call...."The Jungle Bunch: to the Rescue!"

programme.title: Spidey And His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Follow Peter Parker, Gwen Stacy, and Miles Morales and their adventures as the young heroes team up with Hulk, Ms. Marvel, and Black Panther to take down foes like Rhino, Doc Oock, and Green Goblin.

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Dino Ranch follows the action-packed adventures of the Cassidy family as they tackle life in a fantastical, "pre-westoric" setting where dinosaurs still roam. As the young ranchers learn the ropes, they discover the thrill of ranch life whilst navigating the great outdoors through unpredictable challenges.

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Dino Ranch follows the action-packed adventures of the Cassidy family as they tackle life in a fantastical, "pre-westoric" setting where dinosaurs still roam. As the young ranchers learn the ropes, they discover the thrill of ranch life whilst navigating the great outdoors through unpredictable challenges.

programme.title: Cosmo & George
programme.desc: At the end of Season One, Cosmo and Glorious Leader are discovered by the Long's. When Glorious Leader sends shock waves through the Long home, the family finds themselves in completely new surroundings and a new home. And even worse, Glorious Leader has replaced their memories so everyone thinks their new surroundings are the status quo. But even worse, she has also replaced Cosmo and sent the "real" Cosmo into outer space (which is actually the Science Centre).

programme.title: On The Red Dot - Eat Up
programme.sub-title: Eat Up: KK Women's And Children's Hospital(English Subtitles)
programme.desc: (Encore) Genevieve Lee, the runner-up of Masterchef Singapore Season 1, goes behind the scenes to reveal the complexities of big-batch cooking in Singapore's largest women's and children's hospital.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.sub-title: Diabetes Part 2: How Can We Beat The Crisis?
programme.desc: (Encore) How does a country beat a silent killer that could potentially overwhelm our healthcare system if allowed to spiral out of control? Diana Ser uncovers the strategies and technologies that are available to help us fight back.

programme.title: Tanglin
programme.desc: Xue Ling suddenly returns to Singapore, but her change in personality shocks and upsets everyone. Khairul gets into big trouble with Zerina when he turns up late for an interview that she arranged with a magazine. Joy is excited preparing for Christmas, but she isn't sure whether to invite Tanya to the party.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Safe and healthy non-stick cooking, withstands high temperatures and corrosion!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Spend long hours sitting on chairs? Use Ablue Curble Chair for better posture and a healthier spine!

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking And Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie brings us his most ingenious, delicious ways to use up those kitchen cupboard staples and back-of-the- freezer forgotten finds. He teaches us how to make great use of what we already have in our fridges and cupboards, and where we can make swaps in recipes when we have missing ingredients. More pragmatic and enjoyable than ever, Jamie demonstrates simple ways to make surprisingly delicious meals out of pantry classics.

programme.title: Chef Next Door
programme.desc: Chef Jonas shares the easiest and most practical ways to cook restaurant recipes, some tricks of the trade and chef hacks that he has learned over ten years of working inside a professional kitchen. Each episode teaches viewers how to come up with restaurant quality output from modern urban limitation. Be prepared to see how he bounces back from kitchen struggles like lack of time and budget.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off

When the low-ranking fairy Xiao Lanhua accidentally resurrects the powerful demon Qingcang, their fates become cosmically entangled as the world is thrown into turmoil.

programme.title: China's Got Talent
programme.desc: (R) "China's Got Talent" is the talent show with no age limit, no talent restrictions and no cultural boundaries. At stake: a life-changing opportunity.Host: Zhang Chunhua.Judges: Deng Zhiqi, Meng Fei, Nicholas Tse and Annie Yi.

programme.desc: (R)(Dual Language - Mandarin and Korean) Yunjing and Zaiming have a heated exchange. Haijun overhears that his birth mother is actually alive. Thus, he begins his search to find out who she is.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.desc: A 6th Ranger Battalion, under the command of his lieutenant colonel and captain, undertake a daring rescue mission against all odds.

programme.title: One Way

programme.title: Asia Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Martin Soong and Sri Jegarajah at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), "Squawk Box" is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: Asia Street Signs
programme.desc: Anchored by Tanvir Gill at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), "Street Signs" follows the day's biggest moves to provide CNBC's audience with actionable, real-time insights. From the anchor desk to trading desks around the region, "Street Signs" helps viewers capitalize on the plays of the day.

programme.title: Asia Street Signs
programme.desc: Anchored by Tanvir Gill at the Singapore Exchange (SGX), "Street Signs" follows the day's biggest moves to provide CNBC's audience with actionable, real-time insights. programme.title: Us Last Call (recorded) 2023
programme.desc: "Last Call" is a fast-paced, entertaining business show that explores the intersection of money, culture and policy. Through panels, debates and newsmakers, "Last Call" not only delivers fresh takes on the biggest business topics of the day, but also shines a light on some of the other important stories that our viewers may have missed, all with an eye on what’s going to matter to the markets the next day.

programme.title: Capital Connection
programme.desc: Hosted by Dan Murphy at NASDAQ Dubai, "Capital Connection" gives you a reading on Asia's markets mid-day and sets you up for the Middle East and European trading day.

programme.title: Europe Squawk Box
programme.desc: Anchored by Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso, CNBC’s flagship show leads you into and delivers the open of the European markets. Featuring leading business executives, financial strategists and fund managers, "Squawk Box" provides original points of view and instant analysis of the latest business and market news.

programme.title: Europe Street Signs
programme.desc: One hour into Europe’s equity session, "Street Signs" provides the street's view and a link to business stories trending online and on social. programme.title: Us Worldwide Exchange
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC’s "Worldwide Exchange" delivers actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. programme.title: Us Power Lunch

programme.title: Us Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving individual stocks and how investors are reacting. CEOs, analysts and money managers explain their strategies, share opinions, and provide an inside perspective on breaking news stories.

programme.title: Us Closing Bell

programme.title: Us Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Us Last Call (recorded) 2023
programme.desc: "Last Call" is a fast-paced, entertaining business show that explores the intersection of money, culture and policy. Through panels, debates and newsmakers, "Last Call" not only delivers fresh takes on the biggest business topics of the day, but also shines a light on some of the other important stories that our viewers may have missed, all with an eye on what’s going to matter to the markets the next day.

programme.title: Capital Connection
programme.desc: Hosted by Dan Murphy at NASDAQ Dubai, "Capital Connection" gives you a reading on Asia's markets mid-day and sets you up for the Middle East and European trading day.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after Jurassic Park, mathematician Ian Malcolm has to venture into a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: Ella Enchanted
programme.desc: Determined to gain control of her life, Ella sets off on a journey to find her fairy godmother to lift her "curse" of obedience.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: In this new take on the tragic love story, a seasoned musician discovers and falls in love with a struggling artiste.

programme.title: Hancock

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: When a pair of down on their luck house cleaners discover they’re assigned to clean the mansion of Lebron James while he’s overseas, they decide to make a life changing decision to throw a giant party in a quest for immortality and some cash. As the party gets out of control and one of LeBron’s championship rings goes missing, they will be launched into a wild night that they will never forget.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: On June 3, 2017, 25-year-old former American intelligence specialist Reality Winner is confronted by FBI agents arriving at her home to question her suspected role in the mishandling of classified information. programme.desc: This is a unique intellectual entertainment program in which Ogata Takahiro, a member of the comedy trio Panther, earnestly explains the advanced mathematics world. It delves deeply into many complex math problems, such as "Riemann Hypothesis" and "Fermat's Last Theorem", which have tortured even genius mathematicians, in an easy-to-understand manner, with no laughs.

programme.title: News & Weather
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: International News Report 2023
programme.desc: An international news program providing in-depth report on what is happening around the world. (Dual audio when available)

programme.title: News Commentary
programme.desc: NHK news commentators give their views on current issues.

programme.title: The Fountain of Ancient Wisdom
programme.desc: The challenges we face today are similar to what our forerunners went through. The program searches for clues to solve problems, utilizing the wisdoms of historical figures.

programme.title: Today's Cooking
programme.desc: Cooking instructors will show all there is to know for a good hearty cooking.

programme.title: Cooking for Beginners (R)
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Haiku Poetry (R)
programme.desc: Focusing on enjoying Haiku, the program will introduce the various Haiku created by viewers.

programme.title: See, Learn, Explore--A Deep Travelogue in Tohoku 5min.
programme.desc: Explore the unknown charms of the Tohoku region of northern Japan.

programme.title: News & Weather (R)
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: Everyday Tips
programme.desc: The program provides useful and practical information for daily life.

programme.title: Drama Serial Encore "Mampuku" Eps. 39
programme.desc: The 99th NHK Drama Serial is about Fukuko, a cheerful and dedicated woman born in Osaka, who marries to a young businessman filled with vitality. From the prewar to the high economic growth period, they get through the turbulent times and revolutionize the world’s food culture by inventing instant noodles.

programme.title: Where We Call Home (B)
programme.desc: People from around the globe who put down roots in Japan offer a glimpse into their lives and the hardships they face in Japanese society.

programme.title: Health for Today
programme.desc: Difficult to understand medical care is easily explained in this program as well as tips on healthcare.

programme.title: World Music Album (R)
programme.desc: A 5-minute music program introducing classical music.

programme.title: Today's Close-up (R)
programme.desc: The program flexibly probes into a wide range of topics from the NHK’s unique point of view.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Tournament Kyushu Basho Highlights
With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery
programme.desc: This program targets children aged 4 and 5, with an emphasis on education related to health, human relationships, environment, language and expressions to nurture their creativity and assist them in finding happiness through new discoveries.

programme.title: Blue & Yellow 10min
programme.desc: As different colors, blue and yellow can make green by getting together, similarly different lives can coexist by helping each other. This is a program to develop the mind of living together.

programme.title: Go! Go! Cook R'n
programme.desc: A dietary education program introducing tips for cooking and knowledge of ingredients while enjoying singing and dancing with humorous animation.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: News: Good Morning, Japan
programme.desc: Fresh news and information to start off the morning. Specialized reporters and anchors will wake up the viewers with this live news program.

programme.title: News: Good Morning, Japan
programme.desc: Fresh news and information to start off the morning. Specialized reporters and anchors will wake up the viewers with this live news program.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Boogie Woogie" Eps. 34
programme.desc: Hanada Suzuko (Shuri), the poster girl of a small public bathhouse in downtown Osaka, is a pure and innocent young woman who loves singing and dancing. She graduates from elementary school and joins an opera troupe with the desire to make people smile. She rapidly progresses and shows exceptional singing talent thanks to her hard training.

programme.title: asaichi
programme.desc: Looking into topical information ranging from social issues to entertainment news through the eyes of the general public.

programme.title: Secret For A Healthy Life
programme.desc: A program that tells the inspiring story of a healthy life practitioner who has experienced a history of illness. He or she will share stories about their journey and also their secrets to fighting to heal or survive.

programme.title: Luxe Asia
programme.desc: In the new season, Asia's most exclusive series returns to showcase the finest experiences and most luxurious living trends in the region. From the Waldorf Hotel in Shanghai, to Singapore's multi-billion dollar luxury goods market including custom made suits, cars and jets, Luxe Asia provides exclusive insight into Asia's high life. Featuring intimate access into invitation only events and VIP hangouts, this is the most exquisite series yet.

programme.title: Off The Map
programme.desc: Off the Map challenges our preconceived notions about certain countries whose conflicts and tensions constantly make headlines. After visiting the most dangerous cities in the world, Hugo Girard tackles destinations that harbor beautiful tourist attractions but few people dare to visit. A brave and resourceful traveler, Hugo crosses borders and boundaries in order to discover unseen people and places whose beauty will astound you.

programme.title: Mission Restorable
programme.desc: Open the tool box - Bong has a plan! Bong is a top graphic designer. He loves to give hidden treasures a new lease of life. Restoring neglected family heirlooms and upcycling discarded junk, he transforms the ordinary into the extraordinary. From antique furniture to scrapyard junk, there is nothing Bong won't tackle on MISSION RESTORABLE!

programme.title: Brilliant Corners
programme.desc: Presented by surfer, writer, geographer and former European Longboard Champion Sam Bleakley, Brilliant Corners is a trailblazing surf travel series exploring emerging surf cultures, cultural tourism frontiers, and capturing the power of surfing for social good.

programme.title: Destination Happiness
programme.desc: Follow our roadmap to joy as we uncover insightful, uplifting and inspiring ideas for the mind, body and soul. Give your life an over-haul from the inside out.

programme.title: Exploring Nusantara With Kristian Hansen
programme.desc: Showcasing spectacular journey like you've never seen it before! Join with Kristian Hansen on non-stop journey one of Asia's most exotic and breath-taking nations Indonesia. Crossingmotorcycle journey from Sabang to Merauke to show you historic, cultural, people and insights alongside tantalising food and drinks, this show will inspire you and learn more about Indonesia.

programme.title: Meet The Creators
programme.desc: Meet the Creators will take you to see the journey of local works and businesses in Indonesia.

programme.title: The New Zealanders
programme.desc: The New Zealanders is a beautifully shot series introducing us to some of the quirkiest locations and heart-warming characters throughout New Zealand.

programme.title: Tough Trains
programme.desc: Tough Trains takes viewers on some of the most epic and hard-core train journeys on the planet. Trips that should take hours often take days, and nights that should be spent in towns are spent aboard tough trains.

programme.title: Discover London
programme.desc: Discover London uncovers hidden gems, guided by an experienced London Black Taxi driver and respected 'Knowledge of London' tutor, and a youthful Londoner seeking to learn more about her city. With almost every London street having a story behind it, there are surprising revelations along the way.

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World
programme.desc: Welcome to Rudy Maxa's World, the ultimate travel experience with America's leading high-end travel expert. Join Rudy Maxa, public radio's original Savvy Traveler and contributing editor for National Geographic Traveler magazine.

programme.title: Stories Of Taste
programme.desc: Stories of Taste will provide a new perspective about the taste of unique cuisines across the cities in Indonesia. Take an in-depth look at the struggles and history of the owners in building and creating great food or restaurants.

programme.title: The Land Of Spices
programme.desc: Indonesia is famous for its rich spices. This program provides an in-depth insight into each spice, its benefits for life and health. All information is conveyed in a modern yet humorous way.

programme.title: 3-Hour News Show (Live)
programme.desc: 3 Hour News Show is one of our flagship programs which airs daily 4 - 7 PM, this program have a CEO Talk segment where the guest star is the CEO of various reputable companies.

programme.title: Ngoceh
programme.desc: This talk show presented Kiky Saputri and Marshel Widianto, who were previously well-known in the stand-up comedy world. This hilarious duo will comment on various things, from videos, pictures, to social media shots in a funny and entertaining style.

programme.title: Ngonten
programme.desc: This talk show presented Kiky Saputri and Marshel Widianto, who were previously well-known in the stand-up comedy world. This hilarious duo will comment on various things, from videos, pictures, to social media shots in a funny and entertaining style.

programme.title: Sportlite
programme.desc: Find the history and unique story in every sport branches with Sportlite.

programme.title: Earth On Edge
programme.desc: Documentary series about the climate crisis. We travel to Iceland, Greenland, Denmark, Japan and California to explore the effects of a warming planet. While the situation is dire, there is hope. Brilliant minds are coming up with solutions that could show us a new way. As we stand on the edge, what is our next step?

programme.title: Night Guard
programme.desc: A family run business, Night Guard is a private security firm operating in Johannesburg, South Africa, where a violent crime happens every 16 seconds. Night Guard serves the people of Johannesburg by taking on the jobs that the police can't.

programme.title: K9 Mounties
programme.desc: When the Royal Canadian Mountain Police Force are in search of a missing person they call in the help of an elite group. The K9 Mounties are rigorously trained to be able to locate those in need in the hardest to reach places. Watch as some of Canada's finest police officers are pushed to the limit in a gruelling 17 week training programme at the PCMP's Police Dog Service Training Centre in Canada.

programme.title: Lady Killers
programme.desc: British crime writer, Martina Cole, examines the life and times of the most notorious female serial killers across history and asks: why do women kill and why are we surprised when they do?

programme.title: Countdown To Qatar
programme.desc: 100 of the greatest moments in FIFA World Cup history as we count down to the start of the global showpiece in Qatar on 20 November.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days Without Money
programme.desc: Two friends, Milan and Muammer, have decided to recreate Jules Verne's fictional journey without spending a single penny of their own, and thus depending completely on human kindness to eat, sleep and even travel! By doing so, they want to prove that good people can be found in every corner of the globe.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: The Red Sea, the Indian Ocean, Indonesia's coral reefs, the Maldivian archipelago, or the islands of Azores - these are all home to some of the rarest and most beautiful sea life on the planet. Peering through crystal waters, this series reveals the world's most incredible diving spots and transports you to an exquisite underwater paradise.

programme.title: Rivers To The Sea
programme.desc: The Mekong, the Mississippi, the Danube, the Amazon... on every continent, there are mythical rivers, veritable invitations to head for the open sea. They are the source of the greatest civilizations, a refuge for forgotten people, an economic and cultural lung, and fantastic ecosystems.

programme.title: Duo Backpackers
programme.desc: The journey of two travelers to magnificent hidden places across the islands of Indonesia.

programme.title: Miss Adventure
programme.desc: Journey with our intrepid hosts Munah Bagharib and Carla Dunareaunu as they explore the Asia-Pacific region, pushing themselves both physically and mentally for an adventure in the most amazing of locations. From tracking down the Komodo dragon on the island of Komodo to tandem sky diving in New Zealand, they will face their greatest fears and excitement in order to complete every single task at each location.

programme.title: Understanding Asia
programme.desc: Understanding Asia is a seven-part series that delves deep into China, India, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Japan and Hong Kong. Each episode uses an allusive approach that begins with a hypothesis about the subject. We talk to different social scientists and experts around the world to test our hypothesis and in the process, whether by confirmation or refutation, we deep-dive into the psyche and DNA of each subject matter.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.desc: Take a tour of Africa's most spectacular safari lodges in this beautifully shot 4K travel series. From sunrise wildlife encounters at the watering hole to sunset cocktails by the pool, get a taste of the luxury living on offer at these extraordinary retreats.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Dr Scott Miller is warm, caring, charismatic and committed to his patients. Set in the outskirts of London in the quiet village of Richmond upon Thames, Dr Scott's veterinary clinic is anything but. The hustle and bustle of friendly regulars keeps him on his toes, while his home visits are always rewarding and full of surprises.

programme.title: Animalpedia
programme.desc: A program for animal lovers. Everything you need to know about each animal that will be featured in this program.

programme.title: The Animal Library
programme.desc: A program about animals. Not only about pets, but also discuss about the types of care, and also the costs incurred as well as the uniqueness.

programme.title: Tabula Rasa
programme.desc: A religious program that preached by Abu Marlo. He is a former magician that currently become an Indonesian motivator.

programme.title: Sea Morning Show (Live)
programme.desc: SEA Morning Show delivers up to-date news, live reports, talk shows and features about Indonesia and also Southeast Asia which airs daily 6 - 9 am.

programme.desc: A program that tells the inspiring story of a healthy life practitioner who has experienced a history of illness. He or she will share stories about their journey and also their secrets to fighting to heal or survive.

programme.title: Katha Ankahee
programme.desc: Katha a single mother is financially unable to treat her terminally ill son. Viaan, her boss has a proposal that changes her life forever.

programme.title: Dabangii..Mulgii Aayi Re Aayi
programme.desc: Arya, a little girl who is torn between her biological father and her proxy father. A story that attempts to resolve the debate of NATURE vs NURTURE through the girl who grows up in a chaotic world.

programme.title: Kavya - Ek Jazbaa, Ek Junoon
programme.desc: Follow the journey of this determined young lady, who is not afraid to make tough choices. Her goal as an ambitious IAS officer is to serve the nation and help common people despite their caste and status.

programme.title: Hurdang
programme.desc: Student leader Daddu (Sunny Kaushal), in love with Jhulan (Nushrratt Bharuccha), finds himself drawn deeply into the agitation stemming from the implementation of the Mandal Commission’s suggestions. The film’s narrative revolves around what happens when Daddu’s romance with Jhulan gets impacted by his role as a student leader.

programme.title: Betaab
programme.desc: When Sunny meets his childhood friend Roma, cupid strikes. But Roma's father disapproves of their union and decides to separate them.

programme.title: Dil Hai Ke Maanta Nahin
programme.desc: Pooja runs away from home to be with her boyfriend. On her way, she meets Raghu, who agrees to escort her to her destination, and falls in love with him.

programme.title: Ta Ra Rum Pum
programme.desc: A heartwarming story of a race car driver and his family whose dreams are short lived as their lives change from one extreme to the other.

programme.title: Chandigarh Kare Aashiqui
programme.desc: Manu, a bodybuilder from Chandigarh, India, falls in love with Maanvi, a Zumba teacher. All seems well until a revelation causes turmoil in their love story.

programme.title: Chehre
programme.desc: An 80-year-old man with a penchant for real life games in a story about rights and wrongs.

programme.title: Atrangi Re
programme.desc: A Tamil boy meets a girl from Bihar, what follows is a love story for the ages. A non-linear narrative of two romances running in parallel from different timelines.

programme.title: Gumraah
programme.desc: The murder investigation into a young man's death takes an unexpected turn when the cops discover that the prime suspect has a lookalike.

programme.title: Tera Ashiq
programme.desc: Sri Ram falls in love with his childhood friend, Seetha. He, being an academically poor student with a carefree life, struggles to persuade Seetha, a physician, to marry him.

programme.title: Extraa Shots- Bajatey Raho
programme.desc: Surviving family members and friends of a man who was conned by the cunning businessman Sabbarwahl string together a series of their own cons in an attempt to bring him down.

programme.title: Adipurush
programme.desc: Raghav, the prince of the Ikshvaku dynasty from Kosala, tries to rescue his wife, Janaki, from the demon king Lankesh.

programme.title: Na Tum Jaano Na Hum
programme.desc: Esha and Rahul begin to fall in love while exchanging letters with each other. Her parents, though, would like her to marry Akshay, who happens to be Rahul's friend.

programme.title: Radha Ka Sangam
programme.desc: Radha and Govinda are in love with each other and get married. Post the wedding, their life goes awry when Govinda is arrested, leaving Radha to tackle problems all alone.

programme.title: Do Anjaane
programme.desc: Amit is found on the railway tracks, mortally wounded and suffering from amnesia, after which a wealthy couple adopts him. However, six years later, he regains his memory after watching a film.

programme.title: Pyar Mein Twist
programme.desc: Two lonely adults fall in love and decide to get married. However, their grown-up children disapprove and the seniors find themselves torn between love for each other and love for their children.

programme.title: Ab Tak Chhappan 2
programme.desc: Sadhu Agashe, a retired encounter specialist, faces a series of challenges after he returns to Mumbai to solve various criminal cases growing in the city.

programme.title: Ek Ladki Ko Dekha Toh Aisa Laga
programme.desc: Sweety hides a secret about her true love and decides to marry a writer to please her father, Balbir Chaudhary. However, chaos ensues when she decides to fight her family and society to win her love.

programme.title: Namastey London
programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.title: Tiger Zinda Hai
programme.desc: Salman Khan returns as Tiger in this action packed drama, who joins forces again with secret agent Zoya (Katrina Kaif) to help on a rescue mission in Iraq. Featuring hit song Swag se Swagat. (2017)

programme.title: Rebel Raja
programme.desc: Vishnu, the owner of a greeting card company, falls in love with Keerthi who is overprotective. However, her peculiar nature creates a rift between the two of them.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Gulabo Sitabo
programme.desc: Two scheming men get caught up in a game of one-up-manship, each one attracting other members to their clan and each one with an agenda of his own.

programme.desc: It is a story about a con-man who earns his bread and butter by conning women but at the end gets conned himself.
